title: In Tuapse, they are getting ready for a night parade, Ukrainian...
title_en: In Tuapse, they are getting ready for a night parade, Ukrainian...
title_uk: У Туапсе готуються до нічного параду, український...
description: In Tuapse, they are getting ready for a night parade, Ukrainian drones are invited to the party, and the list of honored guests will include jets. In total, 250 regular guests and a dozen reactive guests are expected to visit. In the morning, we will look at the consequences of the party.
description_en: In Tuapse, they are getting ready for a night parade, Ukrainian drones are invited to the party, and the list of honored guests will include jets. In total, 250 regular guests and a dozen reactive guests are expected to visit. In the morning, we will look at the consequences of the party.
description_uk: В Туапсе готовятся к ночной гойде, на вечеринку приглашены украинские дроны, в списке почетных гостей будут и реактивные Роспаблики сообщают, что вечеринка уже началась: сирены воют, а расчеты ПВО встречают дроны, которые заходят со стороны моря. В целом ожидается визит 250 обычных гостей, и с десяток реактивных. Утром посмотрим на последствия вечеринки.

title: Energy infrastructure hit

description: Ukrainian strikes on Russian facilities destroy Putin's reputation and demonstrate the helplessness of his air defense - a military expert "Air defense is focused on Valdae, while the main economic and energy facilities remain uncovered. This undermines the reputation and legitimacy of power even among the Russian security forces", - emphasized military expert and specialist in military counterintelligence Mikhail...
description_en: Ukrainian strikes on Russian facilities destroy Putin's reputation and demonstrate the helplessness of his air defense - a military expert "Air defense is focused on Valdae, while the main economic and energy facilities remain uncovered. This undermines the reputation and legitimacy of power even among the Russian security forces", - emphasized military expert and specialist in military counterintelligence Mikhail...

Это подрывает репутацию и легитимность власти даже среди российских силовых структур", - подчеркнул военный эксперт и специалист по военной контрразведке Михаил...

title: One of the most cynical Russian war crimes is the systematic,...
title_en: One of the most cynical Russian war crimes is the systematic,...

description: One of the most cynical Russian war crimes is the systematic, calculated deportation of Ukrainian children, scattering them across Russia, concealing their fate, "reflashing" their culture and successive, unceremonious militarization. It is extremely important to take our children home from there. Until the Russians broke them. And all initiatives, all activities, all efforts that help this -...
description_en: One of the most cynical Russian war crimes is the systematic, calculated deportation of Ukrainian children, scattering them across Russia, concealing their fate, "reflashing" their culture and successive, unceremonious militarization. It is extremely important to take our children home from there. Until the Russians broke them. And all initiatives, all activities, all efforts that help this -...
description_uk: Один із найбільш цинічних російських воєнних злочинів – системне, прораховане вивезення українських дітей, розпорошення їх по Росії, приховування їхньої долі, «перепрошивка» їхньої культури та послідовна, безцеремонна мілітаризація. Надзвичайно важливо – забирати наших дітей звідти додому. Поки росіяни не зламали їх. І всі ініціативи, всі активності, всі зусилля, які цьому допомагають, –...

title: Mykolaiv: 200 drones launched
title_en: Mykolaiv: 200 drones launched
title_uk: Миколаїв: запущено 200 безпілотників
description: Seven people are currently in hospitals in Dnipro after the Russian strike on the city. Five are hospitalized in Odesa, and two of them are in serious condition. A person was injured in Kharkiv Oblast. Dozens of people were injured by Russian strikes today. Everyone is provided with the necessary assistance. Only this night, Russia launched more than 200 drones against Ukraine, most of which were "shahedy", there was also ballistics. From...
description_en: Seven people are currently in hospitals in Dnipro after the Russian strike on the city. Five are hospitalized in Odesa, and two of them are in serious condition. A person was injured in Kharkiv Oblast. Dozens of people were injured by Russian strikes today. Everyone is provided with the necessary assistance. Only this night, Russia launched more than 200 drones against Ukraine, most of which were "shahedy", there was also ballistics. From...
description_uk: Зараз у лікарнях у Дніпрі перебувають семеро людей після російського удару по місту. Пʼятеро госпіталізовані в Одесі, і двоє з них у важкому стані. Було поранено людину на Харківщині. Десятки людей постраждали від російських ударів сьогодні. Всім надається необхідна допомога. Лише за цю ніч Росія випустила проти України понад 200 дронів, із яких більшість – «шахеди», була також балістика. Від...

І в час, коли Україна виборює свою свободу і незалежність, військовослужбовці Державної прикордонної служби України стоять на передньому краї боротьби, виконуючи надзвичайно важливу місію – захист державного кордону, прикордонну розвідку, протидію диверсантам та...

title: Kyiv: Drone attack
title_en: Kyiv: Drone attack
title_uk: Київ: Атака безпілотників
description: Russia’s Perm oil station struck for 2nd straight day by Ukrainian drones, fires reported. Satellite imagery indicates that at least two fuel storage tanks caught fire at an oil pumping station in Russia’s Perm Krai following a drone attack overnight on April 30, according to Russian Telegram channels and local media.
description_en: Russia’s Perm oil station struck for 2nd straight day by Ukrainian drones, fires reported. Satellite imagery indicates that at least two fuel storage tanks caught fire at an oil pumping station in Russia’s Perm Krai following a drone attack overnight on April 30, according to Russian Telegram channels and local media.
description_uk: Russia’s Perm oil station struck for 2nd straight day by Ukrainian drones, fires reported. Satellite imagery indicates that at least two fuel storage tanks caught fire at an oil pumping station in Russia’s Perm Krai following a drone attack overnight on April 30, according to Russian Telegram channels and local media.
